name: Tenses & Subject-Verb Agreement
description: Correct usage of tenses, active/passive voice, and concord rules.

name: Prepositions & Phrasal Verbs
description: Appropriate prepositions and prepositional phrases used in sentence completions.

name: Direct and Indirect Speech
description: Rules for converting reporting verbs, pronouns, and tenses across speech styles.

name: Synthesis and Transformation of Sentences
description: Combining sentences without using 'and', 'but', or 'so'; transforming sentences using 'too-to', 'no sooner', 'scarcely', active/passive, degree of comparison.

name: Comprehension & Vocabulary
description: Reading unseen passages, answering contextual questions, word meanings, and summarizing.
